CustomField.description: This field is no longer being used as of version 1.10 and should be removed from all layouts. Formerly used to explain the calculation in Seller's Other Adjustments at Closing, a formula field that is now obsolete. See 1.10 Release Notes for more info.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Summarize the other adjustments calculated in Seller's Other Adjustments at Closing. For example, "Includes credits to the buyers for required repairs."
CustomField.label: Seller's Other Adjustments Notes (OLD)
